mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book WHERE title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR author LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR publisher LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR isbn LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR keywords LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (book_id, category_id, title, series, author, publisher, edition, isbn, price, stock, description, keywords, publish_date, created_at) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{series}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{edition}, #{isbn}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{description}, #{keywords}, #{publishDate}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET stock = #{stock} WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
